summary: Capture strategy: hooks primary (zero tokens), MCP tool fallback for runtimes without hooks.

content.decision: Option C — hook-based capture as primary channel, mom_capture_turn MCP tool as fallback.
content.context: Three capture mechanisms were evaluated: (A) hooks only, (B) MCP only, (C) hooks primary + MCP fallback. Option C gives zero-token capture where hooks exist (Claude Code, Cursor) and universal coverage via MCP for runtimes that lack hooks.
constraints: Stop hooks must be lightweight and silent (stop-hook-lesson)
No stdout, no processing, no index rebuild in hooks
impact: Raw JSONL in .mom/raw/ becomes the primary audit trail
